error_signature: HTTP Request - Response body is not valid JSON
title: Invalid JSON response from HTTP request
symptom: The HTTP request node intermittently fails with the error 'Response body is not valid JSON'. This occurs after sending a request to an external API.
applies_when: Receiving a response from an external API
root_cause: The error occurs when the external API takes longer to generate retrieval links, resulting in empty variables being returned as 'NULL' in the response. This leads to an invalid JSON format, causing n8n to throw an error.
fix_steps: Insert a wait node for 30 seconds between the API call to Heygen and the request to the KLINK app.
Test the workflow to ensure the response is valid JSON after the wait.
agent_instruction: Add a wait node to pause execution for 30 seconds after the Heygen request.
